description: Returns the list of active nodes seen by the queried node (API_DIAG.GetActiveNodes).
notes: Requires NODE_DIAG_PORT pointing at the node's API_DIAG socket (commonly 9088 — see [api] diag_port in csnode/config.ini). 'Invalid method name' from the node typically means the wrong port. 'Diag service Unavailable' (503) means the apidiag generated module is missing.
